name: Footnotes of Madness

abilities.name: Deep Discovery
abilities.text: This model may use any card to empower a duel.

abilities.name: Audit Reality
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model cheats fate or empowers a duel with a card in its fieldwork objectives, mark the objective with the value of the card used to cheat or empower as complete.

abilities.name: Contaminated Theories
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an enemy model cheats fate in a duel with this model, with a card in this model's completed fieldwork objectives, this model may drain a ♦ and mark the objective with the value of the cheated card as uncompleted. If it does so, the cheated card's value is set to 0.

extraction_notes: Card includes fieldwork objectives numbered 8-13 (checkboxes) but these appear to be tracking elements rather than rules content
